description_long: This object is a Mauser C96-style semi-automatic handgun with a long, slender barrel and a distinctive boxy receiver. The frame is predominantly matte black metal, with a wooden grip that features horizontal grooves for improved handling. The handgun is accompanied by two detachable magazines, each with visible brass-tipped cartridges at the top. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, and the rear of the grip includes a metal ring for attaching a lanyard. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external embellishments, and the magazines are designed to fit flush with the base of the grip.
description: A Mauser C96-style semi-automatic handgun with a long barrel, grooved wooden grip, and two detachable magazines with visible cartridges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight, and the top of the magazine well.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the barrel, the wooden grip with grooves, and both magazines standing upright.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the grip, the lanyard ring, and the top of the slide.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, the wooden grip, and both magazines with visible cartridges.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is made of dark brown wood with pronounced horizontal grooves running along its length, providing a textured, non-slip surface. It is contoured to fit comfortably in the hand, with a slight palm swell and a rounded backstrap. The base of the grip features a metal lanyard ring, and the wood appears polished but not glossy, with no visible logos or finger grooves. The ergonomic design is classic and functional, emphasizing secure handling.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, forming a smooth oval shape around the trigger. It is integrated seamlessly into the frame, with no undercuts or squared-off edges. The guard is robust and untextured, providing ample space for finger placement and offering protection to the trigger from accidental engagement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and slender, extending well beyond the frame in a straight, unadorned profile. It is not threaded or ported, and there are no visible compensators or external attachments. The finish is matte black, matching the rest of the metal components, and there are no visible markings or fluting on the exterior.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no prominent visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface appears smooth and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns apparent in the images.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular, with slightly beveled edges for easier insertion and removal. There are no finger rests, flares, or visible logos, and the baseplate is simple and functional, matching the utilitarian design of the handgun.
